detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TheBloodyMery._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TheBloodyMery.sol#671-795):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TheBloodyMery.sol#735)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TheBloodyMery.sol#809-821)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TheBloodyMery.sol#741)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TheBloodyMery.sol#829)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheBloodyMery.sol#793)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TheBloodyMery.sol#955)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TheBloodyMery.sol#935)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TheBloodyMery.sol#937)
	TheBloodyMery._rOwned (TheBloodyMery.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheBloodyMery._takeTeam(uint256) (TheBloodyMery.sol#949-957)
	- TheBloodyMery._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TheBloodyMery.sol#909-945)
	- TheBloodyMery.balanceOf(address) (TheBloodyMery.sol#497-501)
	- TheBloodyMery.constructor() (TheBloodyMery.sol#431-461)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheBloodyMery.sol#793)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TheBloodyMery.sol#963)
	TheBloodyMery._rTotal (TheBloodyMery.sol#355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheBloodyMery._getCurrentSupply() (TheBloodyMery.sol#1105-1115)
	- TheBloodyMery._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TheBloodyMery.sol#961-967)
	- TheBloodyMery.constructor() (TheBloodyMery.sol#431-461)
	- TheBloodyMery.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TheBloodyMery.sol#593-615)
